nasb.text: To cleanse the house then, he shall take two birds and cedar wood and a scarlet string and hyssop,

esv.text: And for the cleansing of the house he shall take two small birds, with cedarwood and scarlet yarn and hyssop,

cnv.text: 為了潔淨那房屋，祭司要拿兩隻鳥、香柏木、朱紅色線和牛膝草；

ccb.text: 为洁净房子，祭司要取两只鸟、香柏木、朱红色线和牛膝草，
